name: Hyponatremia & ICH
fullName: Severity-Stratified Hyponatremia Is Associated with Increased Mortality and Complications in Nontraumatic Intracerebral Hemorrhage
population: n=45114, Serum Na ≤7 d of diagnosis
teachingPoint: Serum sodium is a readily-available risk-stratification marker in acute ICH; supports vigilant Na monitoring (causality not established).
